case_title: WILLIAM FALIK ET AL VS. PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC., A CA CORP. ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE ENTRY JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:DEFENDANT (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - RECIPIENT NO LONGER HERE PLEASE UPDATE YOUR FILES - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HYUNG
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM FALIK RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FALIK, WILLIAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC., A CA CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALIK, WILLIAM BENJAMIN JARED COHEN FALIK TRUST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC., A CA CORP. OTTO, DENNIS LEE, HYUNG LEE, DOO IM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-23-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC., A CA CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS DENNIS OTTO AND PACIFIC UNION ETC. (2) WERE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS HYUNG LEE AND DOO IM LEE WHO WERE NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN JARED COHEN FALIK TRUST WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM FLALIK--TRUSTEE. DEFENDANT PACIFIC UNION ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY LAUREEN TURNAUER--OPERATIONS MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
